channel.title: Neighborhoods on URCity — Find Your City. Know the True Cost.
channel.description: Recent content in Neighborhoods on URCity — Find Your City. Know the True Cost.

item.title: Downtown Austin
item.description:
Downtown Austin Neighborhood Guide

Downtown Austin is the heart of the city — a compact, walkable district packed with high-rise condos, restaurants, bars, and live music venues.

Cost of Living

Downtown Austin is the most expensive neighborhood in the city. Expect to pay a premium for walkability and proximity to entertainment.

Expense Cost
Median Rent (1BR) $2,500/month
Median Rent (2BR) $3,200/month
Median Condo Price $650,000
Price per Sq Ft $450

Walkability

  • Walk Score: 92 (Walker’s Paradise)
  • Transit Score: 78 (Excellent Transit)
  • Bike Score: 85 (Very Bikeable)

Things to Do

  • 6th Street — Live music bars and nightlife
  • Rainey Street — Bungalow bars and food trucks
  • Lady Bird Lake — Hiking and biking trails
  • Texas State Capitol — Free tours
  • Paramount Theatre — Historic performing arts venue

Who Lives Here?

Young professionals, tech workers, and empty nesters who want urban living without a car.

item.title: South Congress (SoCo)
item.description:
South Congress (SoCo) Neighborhood Guide

South Congress Avenue is Austin’s most iconic street — a stretch of boutique shops, food trailers, and live music venues that captures the city’s “Keep Austin Weird” spirit.

Cost of Living

SoCo is one of Austin’s pricier neighborhoods, but you’re paying for character and walkability.

Expense Cost
Median Rent (1BR) $2,200/month
Median Rent (2BR) $2,800/month
Median Home Price $550,000
Price per Sq Ft $380

Walkability

  • Walk Score: 88 (Very Walkable)
  • Transit Score: 65 (Good Transit)
  • Bike Score: 82 (Very Bikeable)

Things to Do

  • South Congress Avenue — Shopping and dining
  • Allen Boots — Iconic cowboy boot store
  • Home Slice Pizza — New York-style pizza
  • The Continental Club — Legendary music venue
  • Barton Springs Pool — Nearby spring-fed pool

Who Lives Here?

Artists, musicians, young professionals, and longtime Austinites who value character over convenience.
